## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Validation

- [ ] `pr type-check:all`
- [ ] `pr build:all`
- [ ] Manual smoke test run

## Impact

- Affected package(s):
- Breaking changes:
- Migration required:

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs where behavior changed
- [ ] I added/updated tests for non-trivial logic
- [ ] I kept logs off STDOUT for MCP runtime paths
- [ ] I verified CLI help and examples for command changes
